objective.subject: Mathematics
objective.statement: Represent and convert simple percentages, fractions with denominator 100 and decimal hundredths.
misconceptions: Thinks 25% means 25 whole ones rather than 25 out of 100.
Treats decimal, fraction and percentage forms as separate unrelated facts.
objective.parent_explanation: Can connect percentages with fractions out of 100 and decimal hundredths.
objective.teacher_evidence: Uses hundred grids and place value to convert between percent, fraction and decimal forms.

activities.title: I can connect percentages, hundredths and decimals.
activities.prompt: The eco meter is 25% full: that means 25 out of 100.

teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Reactivate hundredths as equal parts of one whole.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Twenty-five out of one hundred can be shown on a hundred grid.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: A 10 by 10 grid with tappable squares.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: The eco meter is 25% full: that means 25 out of 100.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Introduce percent as a hundred-based representation.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Percent means out of one hundred.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: An eco-city meter fills 25 of 100 cells.

teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Model one value across percent, fraction and decimal.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Twenty-five percent, twenty-five hundredths and zero point two five all show the same amount.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Grid, fraction card and decimal place-value board align.

teaching_sequence.audio_script: Seven percent is seven hundredths, so it is zero point zero seven.
These three cards show the same amount.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Cards connect to the same shaded grid.

teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Use teach-back to secure hundredths place value.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: I put seven in the tenths column. Why should it be hundredths?

manipulative.purpose: Link percentage, fraction and decimal forms through a shared hundred-grid model.
manipulative.interaction_notes: Learners shade grids, build decimal place value, match equivalent cards and explain common traps.
manipulative.accessibility_notes: Pattern overlays support colour-blind access; reduced-motion uses static alignment panels.

adaptive_support.low_sensory: Use calm eco-meter fills and no fast percentage bursts.
adaptive_support.reduced_motion: Use static grid, fraction and decimal panels.
adaptive_support.audio_first: Read percentages as out of one hundred.
adaptive_support.reading_support: Use grid visuals and place-value labels.
adaptive_support.attention_support: Show one representation conversion at a time.
adaptive_support.processing_support: Allow grid inspection before selecting decimal.
adaptive_support.confidence_support: Use comparison language for close decimal traps.
adaptive_support.eal_support: Preteach percent, hundredth, decimal, equivalent and out of.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Build percentages as out of 100 on grids.
Match equivalent percent, fraction and decimal forms.
Repair 7% as 0.7 errors using hundredths place value.
Apply percentages to meters, scores and simple data contexts.
variant_blueprints.review_notes: Avoid financial contexts in this pack.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Maintain percent/fraction/decimal equivalence through spaced review.

misconception_repairs.detect_with: Learner selects tenths decimal for a single-digit percent.
repair_sequence: Show 7 squares on a hundred grid.
misconception_repairs.evidence_of_repair: Learner converts a new single-digit percent to hundredths correctly.

misconception_repairs.misconception: Treats decimal, fraction and percentage forms as separate unrelated facts.
misconception_repairs.detect_with: Learner matches one representation but cannot connect all three.
repair_sequence: Anchor all cards to the same shaded grid.
Match a new set to one model.
misconception_repairs.evidence_of_repair: Learner matches percent, fraction and decimal forms for a new value.

feedback.parent_summary: Can connect percentages with fractions out of 100 and decimal hundredths.
feedback.teacher_evidence: Uses hundred grids and place value to convert between percent, fraction and decimal forms.
next_actions: Use spaced review for single-digit percent conversions.

questions.explanation: 40% is 40 out of 100, so it is 40/100.

reward_payload.explanation: Can connect percentages with fractions out of 100 and decimal hundredths.
